note: off_diagonal_fraction is the share of confidently-labeled-on-both-axes chunks where content and style labels disagree (e.g. algebraic content written in geometric style). 0.0 would indicate the scorers are not actually decoupled. n_content_pool/n_style_pool count chunks written to chunks_content/ and chunks_style/ respectively -- these overlap (a chunk confident on both axes is duplicated into both) but are independent: ambiguity on one axis never removes a chunk from the other axis's pool. n_fully_ambiguous chunks (no signal on either axis) go to chunks_fully_ambiguous/ instead, unusable for either.
